channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-22T11:18Z — 1063 outages, 51,297 customers, 495 fair-weather, 8 DC-proximate
item.description: VA-DOM: 3962 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | MD-WV: 1346 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | MD-WV: 1238 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | MD-WV: 1139 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)

item.title: Weekly digest — week ending 2026-07-19: 8322 outages, 41.9% fair-weather
